metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace

properties.description: Sysmon process-create (EventID 1) where the command line shows encoding or download-and-execute behavior. Requires Sysmon collected into the Event table via AMA.
properties.query: Event | where Source == 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon' and EventID == 1 | where RenderedDescription has_any ('-enc','-EncodedCommand','FromBase64String','Invoke-Expression','IEX ','DownloadString','-nop','-w hidden','bypass') | project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription
